name: The Unbound
description: Smugglers, drifters, dock-hands, runners, and anyone else too useful or too annoying to control.

name: Port Sable Civic Authority
description: Underfunded station governance with a badge on one hand and a bribe list in the other.

name: Void Reavers
description: Scavenger-pirates who mistake cruelty for charisma.

name: Reef Conclave
description: An inward-looking Glassreef order preserving old transit relics and stranger secrets.
